description: Window-5 SG (quadratic, degree 2/3) on triangle wave peak at x[4]=11. Calls 1-4 are warmup MA. Call 5 onward uses coefficients [-3,12,17,12,-3]/35 on the circular buffer (oldest→newest), outputting smooth(center) with 2-sample lag.
note: Expected values for calls 1-4: MA warmup. Calls 5-10: SG coefficient output. Call 5 returns smooth(x[2]=7)=7.0; call 7 returns smooth(x[4]=11) reduced to 10.3143 by the quadratic fit.
